runners.formComment: Ran a better race when third behind Velocity Yin at this track last start over 300m (16.97). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

runners.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 3.5 lengths over 350m at this track in a handy 18.75, beating Dad's Vision. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.
